description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin set on a rectangular grassy plot, featuring a prominent gabled roof with multiple intersecting sections and deep overhangs. The exterior is primarily constructed from timber logs and stone, with visible wooden beams and decorative trusses on the front and side facades. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and side, allowing ample natural light into the interior, while a covered porch with wooden railings extends from the front entrance. The roof is clad in dark shingles, and a stone chimney rises from the center, suggesting a fireplace inside. The cabin sits on a slightly raised stone foundation, and a winding gravel path leads to the main entrance. The overall design evokes a cozy, alpine chalet suitable for mountain or forest environments.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a gabled shingle roof, stone foundation, and a covered front porch, set on a grassy plot with a winding path.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, covered porch with wooden railings, decorative trusses, and large windows beneath the gabled roof.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the porch, the winding path leading to the entrance, and the spacious grassy area in front of the cabin.
description_view_2: The side view reveals additional windows, the depth of the roof overhangs, and the stone foundation along the cabin's length.
description_view_3: The rear view displays a simpler facade with fewer windows, a visible stone chimney, and the continuation of the wooden and stone exterior.
attribute_roof_type: complex gable roof with multiple intersecting sections, deep overhangs, and dark shingle cladding
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple large rectangular windows symmetrically arranged on the front and side facades, with some grouped in pairs and others spaced individually; all windows have a consistent shape and size
attribute_door_placement: Single main entrance door centered on the front facade beneath the porch, no other exterior doors visible
